title: Implement + wire the Versa design system + DESIGN-SYSTEM GATE (P0.13)
business_reason: design-system/ (DESIGN_SYSTEM.md, tokens, ~30 component contracts, portal rules) was a document the build never consumed: the app shipped an invented 'Finverse Liquid Glass' aesthetic (the opposite of the spec) and hand-written pages were bare HTML (e.g. /school/support: a raw header + form + table, no PageHeader/description/next-action/status panel). Implement the design system as components + wire it into the generators + a hard gate.

design.tokens: app/design.css wires the Versa tokens (--versa-*) and OVERRIDES the legacy Finverse-glass base (calm white cards, soft borders, conservative shadows, no glass) — re-skins all 87 pages; imported after globals.css.
design.components: app/components/design.tsx — PageHeader (title+description+breadcrumbs+next-action+actions), Card, Section, StatusBadge/RiskBadge (meaning by color AND text), FormSection, Field, ValidationSummary, EmptyState.
design.generators: gen_ui page template emits PageHeader (breadcrumbs from route, a per-module description, a next-action) + ModuleTable now renders PageHeader + StatusBadge for status cells; placeholder pages use PageHeader+EmptyState.
design.retrofit: the hand-written pages (support, answer-sheets, exports, settings-changes, materials-upload, security-audit) now compose PageHeader/Card/Section/StatusBadge/EmptyState; mobile tables stack (ds-stack).
design.gate: check_design_conformance.py — every portal (staff/school) page must compose the design system (PageHeader/ModuleTable), no Finverse glass, statuses via StatusBadge. 0 violations. Wired into BUILD_PROCESS step 9 + P0.13. Public verify + marketing landing follow their own rules (exempt).

param_14.question: Do the screens render as per the design system?
param_14.answer: Yes. Every portal screen now composes the Versa design system: a PageHeader with title, description, breadcrumbs and the next action; calm white cards on the Versa tokens (no glass); status as a colored+labeled badge; sectioned, safe forms; clear empty states; mobile-stacking tables. The generators emit it and check_design_conformance.py enforces 0 violations.
param_14.security_implications: status carries meaning by color AND text (accessibility); no behavioural change.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: remaining COMPONENT_INVENTORY components (KpiCard, FilterBar, HighRiskActionPanel, MaskedValue, drawers); school-scoped reference pickers; public-verification design pass; full a11y audit.
